cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Team,

I am applying for the IoT Sales Engineer position at Konbini Technologies. I see you need someone who understands hardware and software integration while being comfortable in a fast paced commercial role. My technical background in C++ and IoT systems at EXAIL Robotics aligns well with your Smart Machine and POS solutions.

I currently develop eye tracking software and maintain core features in C++. I also redesigned the installation process at my current company. It used to take about 2 days. Now it takes 2 hours and anyone on the team can run it. That is an 85% reduction in deployment time. This practical approach to technical problem solving helps when overseeing physical implementation and coordinating with technicians.

On my own time, I built ValoFenua, a full stack React app that uses an automated scraper for 1,300 listings and an AI agent for price estimation. I also built a personal job search pipeline using n8n and MCP servers. I like building systems where hardware and software work together to solve business problems.

I am finishing my M.S. in Information Systems Engineering. I am very interested in Konbini's mission to lead unmanned technology for clients like Apple and the Singapore Prisons Service.

Aodren Gloux
aodren.gloux@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/aodren-gloux | github.com/GAodren
